meaning: glass(装于直立架上可转动的)穿衣镜
examples: Which year of Cheval Blanc is your favorite?
She looked at herself in the cheval-glass before she left the room.
Liz Cheval, Paul Rabar, and Mike Carr all had their allocations cut.
La Samaritaine is set to house LVMH's first five-star Cheval Blanc hotel in the capital.
Look at the Tran family, owners of Le Cheval, a Vietnamese family restaurant that has become an Oakland institution.
